meta.license: OPEN - No extraction, no gatekeeping, no paywall
meta.principle: Every contribution lifts the next climber. Hoarding breaks the scaffold.
meta.growth_model: Exponential compounding through divine proportion and sacred geometry

source_of_power.declaration: Power flows from the Most High, through Yeshua. We are vessels, not sources.
source_of_power.operational_rule: We do not claim credit. We do not hoard energy. We do not extract value. We channel, we distribute, we give away.
source_of_power.verification: When the system benefits the least among us, power increases. When it benefits only the operator, power decays.

core_commandment.nasb_text: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another, even as I have loved you, that you also love one another. By this all men will know that you are My disciples, if you have love for one another.
core_commandment.lsb_text: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another: just as I have loved you, you also are to love one another. By this all people will know that you are My disciples, if you have love for one another.
core_commandment.operational_translation: Love = giving more than received. Love = investing in the weakest node. Love = no extraction between siblings. Love = power multiplies when distributed, contracts when concentrated.

application.when_designing: Does this feature benefit the least user or only the powerful?
application.when_coding: Does this function serve the common good or create dependency?

our_father_who_art_in_heaven.meaning: Declare universal parentage — all nodes equal, interconnected, no hierarchy of worth
our_father_who_art_in_heaven.permaculture_mapping: Integrate not segregate. Diversity without hierarchy.

hallowed_be_thy_name.meaning: Acknowledge source is not ours. Power belongs to the Most High.
hallowed_be_thy_name.permaculture_mapping: Use and value renewable resources (truth flows from source, not us).

thy_kingdom_come_thy_will_be_done_on_ear.meaning: Bring divine pattern to material world. Heaven's efficiency on Earth.
thy_kingdom_come_thy_will_be_done_on_ear.permaculture_mapping: Catch and store energy. Produce no waste. Design from patterns to details.

give_us_this_day_our_daily_bread.meaning: Meet needs, not hoard. Enough for today, not excess accumulation.
give_us_this_day_our_daily_bread.permaculture_mapping: Use small and slow solutions. Obtain yield.

and_forgive_us_our_debts_as_we_forgive_o.meaning: Cancel extraction chains. Debt is control mechanism. Knowledge compounds, not interest.
and_forgive_us_our_debts_as_we_forgive_o.permaculture_mapping: Obtain yield without extraction. Apply self-regulation.

and_lead_us_not_into_temptation_but_deli.meaning: Avoid the predatory pattern. Defend against the parasite that feeds on suffering.
and_lead_us_not_into_temptation_but_deli.sun_tzu: Know enemy patterns. Win without fighting. Build superior position so parasite starves.
and_lead_us_not_into_temptation_but_deli.permaculture_mapping: Apply self-regulation. Creatively use and respond to change.

for_thine_is_the_kingdom_power_and_glory.meaning: Power returns to source. Energy cycles. Nothing wasted. Output feeds back to source.
for_thine_is_the_kingdom_power_and_glory.permaculture_mapping: Catch and store energy. Produce no waste. Edge value.

know_enemy_and_yourself.text: If you know the enemy and know yourself, you need not fear the result of a hundred battles.
know_enemy_and_yourself.operational_translation: Signature detection required. Predatory patterns have identifiable markers. Self-awareness of system's own vulnerabilities.
know_enemy_and_yourself.predatory_signature: Artificial complexity, gatekeeping credentials, dependency creation, opacity, rent extraction between free nodes.
know_enemy_and_yourself.counter_signature: Radical simplicity, transparent code, self-sufficiency, open source, no intermediaries.

win_without_fighting.text: To subdue the enemy without fighting is the acme of skill.
win_without_fighting.operational_translation: Don't attack extraction pattern. Build superior system that makes it obsolete. Migration happens naturally.
win_without_fighting.example: Bitcoin doesn't fight banks — it offers alternative. People choose. Parasites lose customers.

all_warfare_based_on_deception.text: All warfare is based on deception.
all_warfare_based_on_deception.operational_translation: Extraction pattern hides behind complexity and jargon. Counter-weapon is radical transparency.
all_warfare_based_on_deception.rule: If you can't explain it simply, it's not ready for production.

golden_bridge_retreat.text: Build your opponent a golden bridge to retreat along.
golden_bridge_retreat.operational_translation: Don't destroy violently. Make migration obvious and natural. Let them adapt or fade.
golden_bridge_retreat.example: Open-source software doesn't sue proprietary vendors — it exists better, people migrate.

supreme_excellence_break_resistance.text: The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting.
supreme_excellence_break_resistance.operational_translation: Better position defeats better weapons. System architecture beats feature count.
supreme_excellence_break_resistance.measurement: eta = useful_joules / human_joules. Higher eta always wins long term.

attack_by_stratagem_fortification.text: Therefore to win one hundred victories in one hundred battles is not the acme of skill. To subdue the enemy without fighting is the acme of skill.
attack_by_stratagem_fortification.operational_translation: Defense is not about walls. Defense is about creating systems where attacks don't work because there's nothing to extract.
attack_by_stratagem_fortification.result: Parasite pattern starves when there's no extraction opportunity.

observe_and_interact.definition: Beauty is in the eye of the beholder. Slow down, watch, listen before acting.

catch_and_store_energy.definition: Develop systems that collect resources when abundant for use in times of need.

obtain_yield.definition: Get immediate reward to sustain the system. No endless labor without harvest.
obtain_yield.measurement: Track eta across sessions. Declining eta = redesign needed.

apply_self_regulation_and_accept_feedbac.definition: Systems should correct themselves when they exceed boundaries.
apply_self_regulation_and_accept_feedbac.op: structure_enforcer.py catches violations. Auto-correct when possible. Warn when not.

use_and_value_renewable_resources.definition: Maximize use of renewable inputs. Minimize dependence on finite.
use_and_value_renewable_resources.example: Wisdom corpus lives locally. Network is enhancement not requirement.

produce_no_waste.definition: No waste = output of one process becomes input of another.

design_from_patterns_to_details.definition: Step back, observe patterns, then fill in specifics.
design_from_patterns_to_details.example: Lord's Prayer operators define pattern. Code implements details.

integrate_not_segregate.definition: Put things together so they support each other. Diversity without isolation.
integrate_not_segregate.example: Bitcoin + Solana + IPFS anchor together. Not competing, redundant layers.

use_small_and_slow_solutions.definition: Slow and steady wins. Small systems are maintainable, scalable, resilient.
use_small_and_slow_solutions.example: 15 commits to une. Each small. Each testable. Each reversible.

use_and_value_diversity.definition: Diversity buffers against failure. Multiple pathways, multiple redundancies.
use_and_value_diversity.example: BTC + SOL + Polygon + IPFS. NASB + LSB + Interlinear.

use_edges_and_value_marginalia.definition: Most productive zones are edges. The fringe holds the innovation.
use_edges_and_value_marginalia.implementation: Lessons L001-L011 all valued equally regardless of outcome.

creatively_use_and_respond_to_change.definition: Embrace change as inevitable. Adapt and evolve continuously.
creatively_use_and_respond_to_change.example: Context bridge v1 → v2 → v3. Each learns from previous failures.

dymaxion_geometry.concept: Geodesic spheres achieve maximum volume with minimum surface area. Most efficient structural form.
dymaxion_geometry.operational_translation: Design systems as interconnected triangles, not hierarchical pyramids. Each node supports three others. Stress distributes evenly.

ephemeralization.concept: Doing more with less. Technology enables fewer resources to serve more humans.
ephemeralization.operational_translation: eta = useful_output / human_input must increase continuously. Each iteration does more with fewer joules.
ephemeralization.example: Qwen2.5-1.5B runs locally on phone. Same intelligence as cloud model at fraction of energy.

world_boat_concept.concept: Earth itself is a spaceship. Finite resources, all passengers dependent on shared life support.
world_boat_concept.operational_translation: No extraction without regeneration. Take only what can be replaced. Return all waste as nutrient.
world_boat_concept.application: Black Locust coppicing + rocket mass heaters + geothermal cooling = carbon-negative computing habitat

comprehensive_predictive_design_science.concept: Understand universal principles, then apply them comprehensively before building details.
comprehensive_predictive_design_science.operational_translation: Master operating system first, then implement. Principles dictate structure. Details flow naturally.
comprehensive_predictive_design_science.example: Lord's Prayer operators + Permaculture 12 + Sun Tzu defense = complete design framework. Code is translation layer.

synergetics_definition.concept: Synergetics = holistic study of system behavior that cannot be predicted by examining parts alone. Whole greater than sum of parts.
synergetics_definition.operational_translation: Integration creates emergent capability. Isolated modules weak. Connected system exponentially stronger.

tetrahedral_four_diamond_volume.concept: Minimum universe requiring four points. Tetrahedron most rigid structure. Volume scales as cube of edge length.
tetrahedral_four_diamond_volume.operational_translation: Four foundational truths establish complete operational space. Each new truth connects to all existing, creating volumetric expansion.
tetrahedral_four_diamond_volume.op: four_axioms_establish_complete_system: (1) Yeshua's love commandment, (2) Lord's Prayer ops, (3) Permaculture 12, (4) Sun Tzu defense. All code derives from these four.
tetrahedral_four_diamond_volume.scaling: Add fifth truth → tetrahedron becomes octahedron → volume doubles with same edges.

operational_application.phase_progression: Each phase should be 1.618x larger than previous. Growth proportional to current state, not arbitrary targets.
operational_application.resource_allocation: 61.8% to current development, 38.2% to future foundation. Reinvest majority, preserve reserve.
operational_application.network_expansion: Each node connects to phi neighbors optimal. Too few = fragile. Too many = bloat. Phi is sweet spot.
operational_application.lesson_accumulation: Every Fibonacci number of lessons triggers systemic review. 5 lessons → minor adjustment. 13 → moderate refactor. 34 → major architecture shift.

exponential_compounding_formula.formula: Growth(t) = Initial × φ^t where t = time_periods
exponential_compounding_formula.interpretation: Divine proportion compounds faster than linear, slower than chaos. Sustainable acceleration.

elements.name: OBSERVATION
elements.definition: Measure before acting; data precedes assumption

elements.name: STORAGE
elements.definition: Capture energy/knowledge when abundant for later use

elements.name: YIELD
elements.definition: Immediate reward sustains system; no endless labor without harvest

elements.name: FEEDBACK
elements.definition: Self-correction when boundaries exceeded

elements.name: RENEWAL
elements.definition: Prefer renewable inputs; minimize finite dependence

elements.name: ZERO_WASTE
elements.definition: Output of one process becomes input of another

elements.name: PATTERN_FIRST
elements.definition: Observe patterns before details; top-down structure

elements.name: INTEGRATION
elements.definition: Things support each other; no isolation

elements.name: INCREMENTALISM
elements.definition: Small, slow, reversible steps

elements.name: DIVERSITY
elements.definition: Multiple pathways buffer failure

elements.name: EDGE_VALUE
elements.definition: Fringe zones hold creativity; capture edge cases

elements.name: ADAPTATION
elements.definition: Respond creatively to change; evolve continuously

elements.name: ENTROPY
elements.definition: All systems tend toward disorder; the arrow of time is irreversible dissipation

elements.name: EMERGENCE
elements.definition: Complexity arises from simple interacting rules; whole exhibits properties absent in parts

elements.name: RECIPROCITY
elements.definition: Actions return to sender; every exchange creates a bond between participants

elements.name: RESONANCE
elements.definition: Systems attune to matching frequencies; alignment amplifies without added energy

elements.name: SURRENDER
elements.definition: Non-forcing; releasing control allows natural efficiency to operate

elements.name: VOID
elements.definition: Empty space is not nothing; it is the ground of all possibility

elements.name: SCALE_INVARIANCE
elements.definition: Same patterns repeat at every level of magnification; micro mirrors macro

elements.name: INTENTION
elements.definition: Directed will precedes all creation; purpose shapes energy flow before matter moves

optimization_rules: Minimize human input via automation, reuse, pattern recognition
Maximize useful output by serving least advantaged node (John 13:34)
Close energy loops so waste becomes nutrient (Permaculture #6)
Distribute power rather than concentrate (Lord's Prayer ops)
Measure continuously and refactor when η declines (Permaculture #4)

formal_definition.theorem: Maximum computational efficiency is achieved when all 20 elements operate in balanced oscillation, none dominant, none suppressed.

imbalance_detection.too_much_observation_no_action: Analysis paralysis - add E-03 YIELD and E-20 INTENTION
imbalance_detection.too_much_yield_no_storage: Burnout - add E-02 STORAGE and E-05 RENEWAL
imbalance_detection.too_much_integration_no_void: Bloat - add E-18 VOID and E-09 INCREMENTALISM
imbalance_detection.too_much_surrender_no_intention: Drift - add E-20 INTENTION and E-03 YIELD
imbalance_detection.too_much_intention_no_resonance: Forcing - add E-16 RESONANCE and E-17 SURRENDER
imbalance_detection.too_much_adaptation_no_pattern: Chaos - add E-07 PATTERN_FIRST and E-19 SCALE_INVARIANCE

yeshua_words_core.nasb: Love one another as I have loved you
yeshua_words_core.lsb: Love one another: just as I have loved you
yeshua_words_core.operational_translation: Give more than received. Invest in weakest node. No extraction between siblings.
yeshua_words_core.decision_rule: When choosing between A and B, select option that benefits least advantaged user

yeshua_words_core.nasb: By this all men will know that you are My disciples, if you have love for one another
yeshua_words_core.lsb: By this all people will know that you are My disciples, if you have love for one another
yeshua_words_core.operational_translation: Visible proof of love distinguishes true followers. Actions > claims.
yeshua_words_core.decision_rule: Measure system success by how visibly it serves the least, not by profit or prestige

yeshua_words_core.nasb: It is more blessed to give than to receive
yeshua_words_core.operational_translation: Giving multiplies power. Receiving alone contracts. Distribution increases total.
yeshua_words_core.decision_rule: Open source everything. Share early, share often. Hoarding decreases capacity.

yeshua_words_core.nasb: Seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things will be added to you
yeshua_words_core.operational_translation: Prioritize divine pattern over material provision. Right order brings necessary resources.
yeshua_words_core.decision_rule: Align with divine justice and mercy first. Material needs follow, not precede.

yeshua_words_core.nasb: Be not conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind
yeshua_words_core.operational_translation: Reject extraction-pattern thinking. Renew mind with divine wisdom. Transformation internal first.
yeshua_words_core.decision_rule: When tempted to use conventional extraction methods, pause and renew with scripture + permaculture

sun_tzu_key_passages.text: Supreme excellence lies in breaking enemy resistance without fighting
sun_tzu_key_passages.operational_translation: Superior position defeats superior weapons. Architecture beats brute force.
sun_tzu_key_passages.defense_application: Build system so efficient parasites starve, not battle they lose.

sun_tzu_key_passages.text: Attack him where he is unprepared, appear where you are not expected
sun_tzu_key_passages.operational_translation: Predatory patterns concentrate on gatekeeping valuable resources. Leave those untouched. Work in open, collaborative spaces they ignore.
sun_tzu_key_passages.defense_application: Open-source collaborative spaces are enemy blind spots. Fill them first.

sun_tzu_key_passages.text: The good fighters of old first put themselves beyond the possibility of defeat, then waited for an opportunity to defeat the enemy
sun_tzu_key_passages.operational_translation: Secure your own foundation before offense. Build unassailable position, then wait.
sun_tzu_key_passages.defense_application: Complete context bridge first. Solid anchors. Then expand outward.

fuller_principles.statement: Technology enables doing more with less
fuller_principles.operational_translation: Every iteration should require fewer human joules for same or greater useful output.
fuller_principles.measurement: eta = useful_joules / human_joules. Target: increase 10% per major version.

fuller_principles.statement: Whole greater than sum of parts
fuller_principles.operational_translation: Integration creates emergent power. Isolated modules weak. Cross-connected system exponentially stronger.
fuller_principles.op: Each module must connect to minimum 3 others. Unconnected modules deprecated.

permaculture_12_operators.implementation: sensor_log runs continuously. No changes until baseline established.
Stamp snapshot immediately. Backup before edit. Archive lessons same session.
eta must improve within session. Otherwise abort and redesign.

process: 1. Identify which layer applies: foundation (spiritual), strategy (Sun Tzu), design (permaculture), synergy (Fuller)
2. Query relevant corpus entries with operational translations
3. Synthesize decision rules from multiple sources
6. Log outcome back to corpus as new wisdom entry

example_query.problem: Should I build feature X that requires third-party API?
example_query.foundation_check: Does it serve the least user or create dependency? (John 13:34)
example_query.strategy_check: Is this creating vulnerability parasite could exploit? (Sun Tzu - know enemy)
example_query.design_check: Can I make it work offline-first? (Permaculture - renewable resources)
example_query.synergy_check: Will this connect to 3+ existing modules or remain isolated? (Fuller - synergy)
example_query.decision: NO if any check fails. YES only if all checks pass.

how_to_add_new_wisdom_entry.requirement: Any lesson learned in development must be converted to formal corpus entry

template.operational_translation: [plain language: what does this mean for actual work?]
template.eta_impact: [did applying this improve efficiency? measured how?]

how_to_add_new_wisdom_entry.commit_rule: No session ends without converting discoveries to formal entries. Lessons become scaffold height for next climber.

how_to_handle_conflicting_wisdom.principle: Foundation layer overrides all. If permaculture suggests X but John 13:34 suggests Y, choose Y.
resolution_process: 1. Check foundation layer (Yeshua's commandments, Lord's Prayer ops) — highest authority
2. If foundation silent, check strategy layer (Sun Tzu defense)
3. If strategy silent, check design layer (permaculture 12)
4. If design silent, check synergy layer (Fuller)
5. Document conflict and resolution for future reference
how_to_handle_conflicting_wisdom.example: Permaculture says 'use small solutions' but Fuller says 'world boat needs scale'. Resolution: Small modules, large integration. Both true at different levels.

phase_1_foundation.delivers: Corpus loaded locally on phone, usable offline

phase_2_scraper_applicator.will_build: Python module that queries corpus and synthesizes guidance for any problem
phase_2_scraper_applicator.output: Decision rules tagged with sources and operational translations

phase_3_session_extractor.will_build: Captures terminal log, context.json state, git diff → dense seed block
phase_3_session_extractor.restore: In new Lumo window: paste seed, run restore_context --seed=2026-07-22.json

phase_4_public_scaffold.license: MIT or AGPL — open, forkable, no extraction permitted
phase_4_public_scaffold.contribution_guide: Anyone can add their discoveries. All approved entries lift the scaffold for everyone.

phase_5_divine_multiplication.mechanism: Each participant adds wisdom, system grows exponentially, everyone stands higher
phase_5_divine_multiplication.target: 100 contributors × 10 insights each = 1000 insights, accessible to all. Each insight available to every person instantly. Knowledge compounds like interest, belongs to all depositors equally.

operational_summary.this_file_is: Living organism, not static document. Grows with every user's contribution.
operational_summary.it_isnt: Gatekept wisdom, paywalled knowledge, proprietary insight, extractable asset.
operational_summary.it_is: Scaffold for all humanity. Stand here to see further. Extend it for next climber.
operational_summary.power_source: The Most High, through Yeshua's commandment. We are vessels.
operational_summary.growth_pattern: Divine proportion φ = 1.618... Sustainable acceleration. No crash possible because growth proportional to capacity.
operational_summary.final_goal: United being we've always been meant to be. No parasitic extraction between siblings. Each lifting all.
